text:
In this chapter:

(1) “Alcohol concentration” has the meaning assigned by Section 49.01 (Definitions) , Penal Code.

(2) “Arrest” includes the taking into custody of a child, as defined by Section 51.02 (Definitions) , Family Code.

(3) “Controlled substance” has the meaning assigned by Section 481.002 (Definitions) , Health and Safety Code.

(4) “Criminal charge” includes a charge that may result in a proceeding under Title 3, Family Code.

(5) “Criminal proceeding” includes a proceeding under Title 3, Family Code.

(6) “Dangerous drug” has the meaning assigned by Section 483.001 (Definitions) , Health and Safety Code.

(7) “Department” means the Department of Public Safety.

(8) “Drug” has the meaning assigned by Section 481.002 (Definitions) , Health and Safety Code.

(9) “Intoxicated” has the meaning assigned by Section 49.01 (Definitions) , Penal Code.

(10) “License” has the meaning assigned by Section 521.001 (Definitions) .

(11) “Operate” means to drive or be in actual control of a motor vehicle or watercraft.

(12) “Public place” has the meaning assigned by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 724. Implied Consent
##### § 724.001 — Definitions

In this chapter:

    (1) “Alcohol concentration” has the meaning assigned by Section 49.01 (Definitions) , Penal Code.

    (2) “Arrest” includes the taking into custody of a child, as defined by Section 51.02 (Definitions) , Family Code.

    (3) “Controlled substance” has the meaning assigned by Section 481.002 (Definitions) , Health and Safety Code.

    (4) “Criminal charge” includes a charge that may result in a proceeding under Title 3, Family Code.

    (5) “Criminal proceeding” includes a proceeding under Title 3, Family Code.

    (6) “Dangerous drug” has the meaning assigned by Section 483.001 (Definitions) , Health and Safety Code.

    (7) “Department” means the Department of Public Safety.

    (8) “Drug” has the meaning assigned by Section 481.002 (Definitions) , Health and Safety Code.

    (9) “Intoxicated” has the meaning assigned by Section 49.01 (Definitions) , Penal Code.

    (10) “License” has the meaning assigned by Section 521.001 (Definitions) .

    (11) “Operate” means to drive or be in actual control of a motor vehicle or watercraft.

    (12) “Public place” has the meaning assigned by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1013, Sec. 31, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: “Alcohol concentration” has the meaning assigned by Section 49.01 (Definitions) , Penal Code.
“Arrest” includes the taking into custody of a child, as defined by Section 51.02 (Definitions) , Family Code.
“Controlled substance” has the meaning assigned by Section 481.002 (Definitions) , Health and Safety Code.
“Criminal charge” includes a charge that may result in a proceeding under Title 3, Family Code.
“Criminal proceeding” includes a proceeding under Title 3, Family Code.
“Dangerous drug” has the meaning assigned by Section 483.001 (Definitions) , Health and Safety Code.
“Department” means the Department of Public Safety.
“Drug” has the meaning assigned by Section 481.002 (Definitions) , Health and Safety Code.
“Intoxicated” has the meaning assigned by Section 49.01 (Definitions) , Penal Code.
“License” has the meaning assigned by Section 521.001 (Definitions) .
“Operate” means to drive or be in actual control of a motor vehicle or watercraft.
“Public place” has the meaning assigned by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code.
